abilities.name: Bright Personality
abilities.requirements: Entry requirement met (Sincerity rank 3+) — Friendship path
abilities.description: Once per encounter as a Free Action, choose one enemy NPC or Digimon. Make a Broadcast check DN 12. On a success they take -2 to their next attack roll. You have that effect on people.

abilities.name: Harder Than I Look
abilities.requirements: Entry requirement met (Sincerity rank 3+) — Sincerity path
abilities.description: Whenever your Digimon takes damage that would reduce them to below half their max HP, they gain +2 to all damage rolls until the end of the round.

abilities.name: Pure Heart
abilities.requirements: Entry requirement met (Sincerity rank 3+) — Love path
abilities.description: Once per encounter as a Free Action you may attempt to calm one non-boss enemy Digimon. Make a Tame check DN 14. On a success that Digimon skips their next action.

abilities.name: Center of Attention
abilities.description: Bright Personality now affects all enemies within 3 spaces of the target, not just one.

abilities.name: I Believe In You
abilities.description: Once per session as your Basic Action, choose one allied Digimon. They immediately restore HP equal to your Sincerity rank x 3 and remove all status effects.

abilities.name: Won't Stay Down
abilities.requirements: Harder Than I Look, Sincerity rank 4
abilities.description: Once per encounter when your Digimon would trigger the cascade at Default Stage, you may spend 8 Hope to have them stay at 1 HP with their Default Stage intact.

abilities.name: The Mimi Effect
abilities.requirements: Any two Row 2 abilities, Sincerity rank 6
abilities.description: Once per session at the start of your turn you may spend 5 Hope to activate The Mimi Effect. Until the start of your next turn all allied Digimon deal +3 damage and all enemy Digimon take -2 to attack rolls.
